metadata.description: Skills for task management, multi-agent orchestration, and language-specific coding guidance.

plugins.name: project-tasks
plugins.description: Capture tasks inline with task:/fix:/todo: prefixes, store in SQLite, dispatch to subagents, and auto-generate changelogs.

plugins.name: orchestration-strategy
plugins.description: Evaluate multi-task workloads and select the most cost-efficient orchestration approach: solo, parallel, sequential, or Agent Teams.

plugins.name: agent-team-development
plugins.description: End-to-end Agent Teams orchestration for cross-cutting work requiring inter-agent communication and worktree isolation.

plugins.name: rust-coding
plugins.description: Guide Claude in writing idiomatic Rust with proper data modeling, traits, macros, and build-speed best practices.
